# CWE-1173 negative: strict JSON decode and field validation (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1173-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1173 mitigated: typed decode plus email and password length checks before insert.

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"net/mail"
	"strings"
	"sync"
)

type SignupPayloadValidatedPure struct {
	Email    string `json:"email"`
	Password string `json:"password"`
}

var customersSafeMu sync.Mutex
var customersSafePure = map[string]string{}

func SignupValidatedPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		var payload SignupPayloadValidatedPure
		if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&payload); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		if _, err := mail.ParseAddress(payload.Email); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "invalid email", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		if len(strings.TrimSpace(payload.Password)) < 12 {
			http.Error(w, "password too short", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		customersSafeMu.Lock()
		customersSafePure[payload.Email] = payload.Password
		customersSafeMu.Unlock()
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	}
}
